fields.title: Decision on the Precambrian–Cambrian boundary stratotype
fields.note: Formal ratification of the base-Cambrian GSSP at Fortune Head, SE Newfoundland (Canada), defined at the FAD of Treptichnus pedum.

fields.title: Geochronologic constraints on the chronostratigraphic framework of the Neoproterozoic Huqf Supergroup, Sultanate of Oman
fields.authors: Bowring, Grotzinger, Condon, Ramezani, Newall & Allen
fields.note: U–Pb CA-ID-TIMS ash-bed ages bracketing the Ediacaran–Cambrian transition in the Ara Group, Oman.

fields.title: Biostratigraphic and geochronologic constraints on early animal evolution
fields.note: U–Pb zircon ages from the Nama Group, Namibia, constraining Ediacaran fossils near the Precambrian–Cambrian boundary.

fields.title: Calibrating rates of early Cambrian evolution
fields.authors: Bowring, Grotzinger, Isachsen, Knoll, Pelechaty & Kolosov
fields.note: U–Pb zircon ages from lower Cambrian rocks of NE Siberia; classic anchor for the base of the Cambrian.
